name: Pub On The Green
about: Ontario Golf Club offers a blend of a traditional golf course experience with modern amenities, including a dedicated Trackman simulator bay for practice and play. The facility is a full-service country club featuring an 18-hole golf course, restaurant with pub atmosphere, and various events and leagues. While it provides a premium environment with both on-course and simulator offerings, specific pricing for simulator time is not publicly detailed on the website.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman technology for game analysis and play
Full-service country club amenities including dining and events
Combination of on-course golf and indoor simulator options

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant and pub available on-site
Full bar service available at the pub restaurant

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology available for practice and play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers are typically expected to bring their own clubs for simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the facility has a full restaurant and bar on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes on a simulator takes approximately 1-2 hours depending on the pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be family-friendly with a pool/patio area and hosting events that may appeal to families.
